steps.name: Logging in the user with email: greencitytest69@hotmail.com
Clicking signin button in the header
Pre-condition: Ensure the user is logged in
Step 1: click on user menu, and ensure that 'Profile' and 'Sign out' buttons are enabled.
Clicking the user menu in the header.
Step 2: Click on 'Profile' option and verify redirection.
Clicking the profile link in user menu in the header.
Step 3: Click on 'Sign Out' link, and ensure it change url and make user logged out.
Clicking the user menu in the header.
Clicking the sign out link in user menu in the header.
